title: Docrates - Online Cancer Second Opinion Service
problem: Cancer patients face uncertainty about their diagnosis and treatment plan. Getting a second opinion is difficult, time-consuming, and often requires travel.
solution: Online platform connecting cancer patients with leading oncologists for remote second opinions. Patients upload records, receive expert review and recommendations.
technology: Telemedicine platform, secure document sharing, video consultations
regulatory_notes: Licensed medical service, oncologist credentials verification.
varden_fit: Low — highly specialized oncology service, not primary care infrastructure. Interesting model but different segment.
notes: Specialized telemedicine model. Example of vertical-specific digital health.
